findings.sentence: After all, our users generate videos from plain text, using lifelike [AI avatars](https://www.synthesia.io/features/avatars) that can narrate almost anything in [130+ languages](https://www.synthesia.io/features/languages).
findings.title: Synthesia languages count slightly stale (130+ vs 160+)
findings.suggested_fix: Synthesia now advertises **160+ languages** on the homepage. Worth refreshing '130+ languages' → '160+ languages' next time you touch this page, but not urgent.

findings.sentence: For now, only [52%](https://mitsloan.mit.edu/ideas-made-to-matter/new-report-documents-business-benefits-responsible-ai) of companies practice some level of responsible AI, and 79% say implementations are limited in scale and scope.
findings.title: Stat needs review: '52%'
findings.suggested_fix: Stat reference: `52%`. Stats can stay relevant for years — only update if the underlying claim is clearly out of date or used as a freshness signal in the article.

findings.sentence: In response, James Cleverly, the Foreign Secretary of the United Kingdom, recently embarked on a unique [collaboration](https://twitter.com/JamesCleverly/status/1720335352940949970?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1720335352940949970%7Ctwgr%5E4e8495cb01ed5462cda6cddb9fb1436354165109%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.synthesia.io%2Fpost%2Fresponsible-ai) with the [AI video generator](https://www.synthesia.io/features/ai-video-generator) Synthesia to advocate for the safe and responsible use of AI technologies.
